style: Polished 16-bit pixel art hero background for a side-scrolling mobile arcade flying game
smooth readable sky gradients with pixel-art edges
art_direction: match the day theme benchmark: flat, open, calm, and immediately readable during fast gameplay
single side-on stage backplate rather than poster art, splash art, a street scene, or a tunnel scene
theme identity comes from palette, horizon silhouettes, and small edge props rather than large central objects
framing: no canyon, hallway, tunnel, or city street perspective pulling into the center
no close foreground frame around the play area
composition: top 55 to 65 percent remains open low-detail sky or atmosphere for the flight corridor
central 65 percent of the image width stays simple behind the duck and pipes
theme landmarks stay below the flight path as distant lower-middle silhouettes
bottom 18 to 24 percent is a simple chunky terrain band that can be sampled into a scrolling ground strip
detail is strongest near the bottom corners and far edges
detail: no busy flowers, rocks, rain streaks, stars, bubbles, or debris in the central play corridor
leave clouds, sparkles, animals, weather, and other small motion to runtime overlays
color: one clear background color family and one ground color family
avoid neon confetti outside theme accents
negative: foreground wall blocking the play area

day.name: bright daytime countryside
day.scene: cheerful open meadow under a clear blue day sky
day.upper: clean cyan-blue sky with two or three small separated cumulus cloud groups placed high and far from the center flight path
day.midground: pale rolling hills and a few low separated cloud puffs across the lower middle, never forming one giant white wall
day.ground: chunky saturated green meadow strip with a clean grass lip, small flowers, and simple grass texture
day.edges: tiny tree clusters and flowers only at the far edges and bottom corners
day.palette: cyan sky, warm white clouds, fresh greens, small red/yellow flower accents
day.motion_hooks: slow cloud sprites and very occasional tiny distant birds
negative: busy flower field in the center

sunset.name: warm sunset fields
sunset.scene: golden countryside at sunset with calm arcade readability
sunset.upper: orange-to-rose sky gradient with soft cloud shapes, no giant sun disk in the flight corridor
sunset.midground: low lavender hills and warm cloud bank across the lower middle, silhouetted softly
sunset.ground: warm grass and earth strip with a clean lip, amber highlights, and sparse flowers
sunset.edges: small fence pieces or shrubs at far bottom edges only
sunset.palette: orange, peach, rose, lavender shadows, warm green grass
sunset.motion_hooks: slow cloud sprites, sunset glow tint, tiny drifting motes

night.name: quiet moonlit night
night.scene: peaceful blue night landscape with stars and distant hills
night.upper: deep navy sky with sparse stars and a small moon away from the central play path
night.midground: low blue hills and soft mist band with simple silhouettes
night.ground: dark grassy terrain strip with a clean cool-green lip and subtle moonlit pixels
night.edges: small shrubs or tiny roof silhouettes tucked near bottom edges
night.palette: navy, midnight blue, muted teal, moonlit pale yellow accents
night.motion_hooks: twinkling stars and rare firefly specks

western.name: western desert canyon
western.scene: open desert with mesas and dusty arcade staging
western.upper: clear turquoise-to-warm sky with minimal clouds and no large sun disk
western.midground: low red-rock mesas and distant cactus silhouettes below the center line
western.ground: chunky ochre dirt and dry grass strip with a clean dusty lip
western.edges: small cactus, wagon wheel, or rock props at the far bottom edges only
western.palette: turquoise sky, ochre sand, terracotta rock, muted sage accents
western.motion_hooks: dust motes and heat shimmer tint

jungle.name: misty jungle canopy
jungle.scene: lush tropical jungle with a readable open misty center
jungle.upper: pale teal mist and soft canopy shapes high above the play path
jungle.midground: layered distant jungle silhouettes across the lower middle with softened contrast
jungle.ground: chunky leafy jungle floor strip with a clean fern and moss lip
jungle.edges: vines, leaves, and flowers framing only the far sides and bottom corners
jungle.palette: teal mist, deep green foliage, lime highlights, small warm flower accents
jungle.motion_hooks: subtle drifting leaf particles and rare bird silhouettes

mountain.name: alpine mountain valley
mountain.scene: bright alpine valley with snowy mountains in the distance
mountain.upper: clean blue sky with sparse soft clouds, mostly open over the play corridor
mountain.midground: large but distant snowy mountain silhouettes pushed behind the play area with softened blue shadows
mountain.ground: green alpine meadow strip with a clean grass lip, small stones, and wildflower pixels
mountain.edges: pine trees only at far lower edges, never crossing the central flight corridor
mountain.palette: sky blue, snow white, glacier cyan, pine green, meadow green
mountain.motion_hooks: slow clouds and rare snow sparkle specks
negative: mountain peak filling the whole center

egypt.name: ancient Egypt desert
egypt.scene: open golden desert with tiny ancient ruins along the horizon
egypt.upper: simple golden sky occupying most of the image, no sun disk, no pyramid entering the upper play area
egypt.midground: very small far-away pyramid silhouettes, low dunes, and tiny temple blocks forming a thin horizon band below the center line
egypt.ground: chunky warm sand terrain strip with a clean sand lip, scattered sandstone pixels, and a few small flat blocks
egypt.edges: tiny palm silhouette or broken ruin pieces only near the bottom far edges
egypt.palette: golden sky, pale sand, terracotta shadows, muted sandstone brown
egypt.motion_hooks: dust motes, heat shimmer, low ruin trim

lagoon.name: tropical lagoon beach
lagoon.scene: bright tropical lagoon with open sky and turquoise water
lagoon.upper: clear cyan sky with soft white clouds, uncluttered through the flight corridor
lagoon.midground: turquoise water, distant island shapes, and soft reef silhouettes across the lower middle
lagoon.ground: pale sand beach strip with a clean lip, small shells, and aqua reflection pixels
lagoon.edges: palm leaves or island foliage only at far lower edges
lagoon.palette: cyan, turquoise, pale sand, seafoam white, tropical green accents
lagoon.motion_hooks: sparkle particles, slow cloud sprites, tiny wave shimmer

underwater.name: underwater reef
underwater.scene: clear underwater reef environment with open blue water
underwater.upper: blue water gradient with soft light rays and very low detail in the play corridor
underwater.midground: distant reef silhouettes and soft kelp shapes below the center line
underwater.ground: chunky coral and seafloor strip with a clean sand-and-rock lip
underwater.edges: coral fans and seaweed at bottom corners only
underwater.palette: deep aqua, teal blue, coral orange, seafoam highlights, dark reef shadows
underwater.motion_hooks: bubbles, subtle caustic shimmer, tiny fish silhouettes far behind gameplay

volcano.name: volcanic lava field
volcano.scene: dangerous volcanic landscape with readable smoky air
volcano.upper: dark smoky red sky with soft ash haze and no bright clutter in the center
volcano.midground: distant low volcano silhouettes and lava glow below the center line
volcano.ground: chunky black rock strip with a clean lava-lit edge and small orange cracks
volcano.edges: small basalt rocks and ember-lit shapes at far bottom edges
volcano.palette: charcoal, crimson, ember orange, smoky purple, hot yellow accents
volcano.motion_hooks: embers, smoke wisps, occasional lava glow pulse

arctic.name: arctic snowfield
arctic.scene: cold open arctic landscape with icy distance
arctic.upper: pale blue sky with soft aurora or cloud tint, very open over the play corridor
arctic.midground: low icy hills and distant glacier silhouettes across the lower middle
arctic.ground: chunky snow and ice strip with a clean snow lip, small blue shadow pixels, and sparse ice chunks
arctic.edges: small ice rocks or snow mounds near bottom corners
arctic.palette: pale blue, icy cyan, snow white, muted violet shadows
arctic.motion_hooks: light snow particles and slow mist

space.name: outer space horizon
space.scene: arcade space backdrop with a distant planet horizon
space.upper: deep starry space with sparse stars and no dense galaxy noise
space.midground: soft nebula haze and a distant planet curve or moon shapes below the center line
space.ground: chunky alien rock strip with a clean rim and small glowing mineral pixels
space.edges: small crater rocks and alien plants only at far bottom edges
space.palette: deep navy, violet, cyan stars, muted magenta nebula, dark rock
space.motion_hooks: slow star specks and subtle nebula drift

cave.name: glowing crystal cave
cave.scene: subterranean cave with readable open blue darkness
cave.upper: dark cave air with soft blue haze, open enough for the flight corridor
cave.midground: distant cave walls and crystal silhouettes kept low and softened
cave.ground: chunky stone strip with a clean rock lip and small glowing crystal pixels
cave.edges: stalactites and crystals only near far sides and bottom corners, not across the center
cave.palette: deep blue, slate gray, teal glow, violet crystal accents

neonCity.name: futuristic neon city
neonCity.scene: flat futuristic night skyline staged like the day theme, not a street canyon
neonCity.upper: open dark blue to teal sky haze with sparse glow, no rain streaks or tiny light noise in the flight corridor
neonCity.midground: low distant simplified block skyline silhouettes below the center line with only a few cyan and magenta accent windows
neonCity.ground: simple chunky wet pavement or rooftop strip with a clean lip and controlled cyan and magenta reflection pixels
neonCity.edges: small neon panels and low building edges pushed to far sides and bottom corners only
neonCity.palette: dark navy, cyan, teal, magenta, small warm window accents
neonCity.motion_hooks: rain particles, neon flicker, faint haze

pixelTokyo.name: rainy pixel Tokyo
pixelTokyo.scene: Tokyo-inspired rainy street skyline with neon atmosphere
pixelTokyo.upper: blue-gray rainy sky and mist with open readable space through the play path
pixelTokyo.midground: low layered rooftops, distant tower silhouette kept small, lantern glow and neon accents mostly below the center line
pixelTokyo.ground: chunky wet street strip with a clean curb lip and subtle reflections
pixelTokyo.edges: cherry branches, signs, or rooftops only at far edges and lower corners
pixelTokyo.palette: blue-gray rain, teal shadows, pink neon, warm lantern orange

london.name: rainy London skyline
london.scene: misty London-inspired city with classic wet-street mood
london.upper: cool rainy blue sky with soft mist and open playable space
london.midground: distant parliament-style silhouettes and bridges kept low and softened by rain haze
london.ground: chunky wet stone street strip with a clean curb lip and small lamp reflections
london.edges: lamp posts or roof edges only at far bottom edges
london.palette: rain blue, slate teal, warm lamp gold, wet stone gray
london.motion_hooks: rain streaks, fog, subtle lamp glow

losAngeles.name: sunny Los Angeles coast
losAngeles.scene: bright Southern California coast with open sky and distant palms
losAngeles.upper: clear turquoise sky with soft haze and sparse clouds
losAngeles.midground: low beachside skyline, distant hills, and palm silhouettes kept below the center line
losAngeles.ground: chunky warm sand and boardwalk strip with a clean lip and small sunlit pixels
losAngeles.edges: tiny palm clusters or beach props only at far lower edges
losAngeles.palette: turquoise sky, pale sand, warm peach, palm green, soft blue ocean
losAngeles.motion_hooks: sun glints, slow clouds, rare distant birds

roughOcean.name: rough stormy ocean
roughOcean.scene: stormy open sea with readable wave depth
roughOcean.upper: teal-gray storm sky with distant rain bands and open low-detail space through the flight corridor
roughOcean.midground: dark horizon, rolling ocean swells, whitecaps, and tiny far rocks kept low below the center line
roughOcean.ground: chunky dark wet-water edge strip with a clean foam lip and sea-spray pixels
roughOcean.edges: small rocks or broken buoy silhouettes at far lower edges only
roughOcean.palette: storm teal, blue-gray, dark navy water, off-white foam, muted green shadows
roughOcean.motion_hooks: sea spray, rain, subtle lightning tint
